    PerAUEncryption.encryptChannelByRegion(byte[] plaintextLe, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> chromosomes, int datasetId, String channelName, Map<String,byte[]> keyMap)
    M90.4: per-AU dispatch on chromosome name.
    static List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment>
    PerAUEncryption.encryptChannelToSegments(byte[] plaintextFloat64Le, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, int datasetId, String channelName, byte[] key)
    Slice flat float64 plaintext into per-spectrum rows and encrypt each with a fresh IV.
    static List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment>
    PerAUEncryption.encryptChannelToSegments(byte[] plaintextLe, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, int datasetId, String channelName, byte[] key, int bytesPerElement)
    M90.1: slice flat little-endian plaintext into per-AU rows of bytesPerElement bytes per logical element and encrypt each with a fresh IV.

    Modifier and Type
    Method

    static byte[]
    PerAUEncryption.decryptChannelByRegion(List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> segments, List<String> chromosomes, int datasetId, String channelName, Map<String,byte[]> keyMap)
    M90.4: inverse of PerAUEncryption.encryptChannelByRegion(byte[], long[], int[], List, int, String, Map).
    static byte[]
    PerAUEncryption.decryptChannelFromSegments(List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> segments, int datasetId, String channelName, byte[] key)
    Decrypt every row in order and concatenate plaintext float64 bytes.
    static byte[]
    PerAUEncryption.decryptChannelFromSegments(List<PerAUEncryption.ChannelSegment> segments, int datasetId, String channelName, byte[] key, int bytesPerElement)
    M90.1: decrypt every row and concatenate the plaintext bytes, validating the per-row plaintext length against length * bytesPerElement.
